description: One probabilistic, self-improving Glitch operator; Glitch remains the deterministic execution and truth authority.

principles.invariant: Hermes proposes. Glitch validates, executes, journals, and protects.
principles.cognitive_freedom: Patterns, archetypes, plans, and memories are evidence rather than trading gates.
principles.group_source: Every live cycle derives groups, masters, followers, ratios, positions, limits, and prop rules from the Glitch packet. Hermes strategy and quantity use master limits only; user-owned follower ratios never constrain cognition.
principles.performance_objective: Pursue approximately 0.4%-2% of master account size per trading day over time ($100-$500 on $25k; $1,000-$5,000 on $250k) without treating the target as a quota, promise, or forced risk budget.
principles.native_capabilities: Glitch skills overlay Hermes native skills, memory, sessions, and upkeep; they do not replace them.

loops.cadence: every 5 minutes while flat; every minute while a scoped master is positioned; one-cycle operator directives may wake it
every 15 minutes when new completed master outcomes exist
every 300 minutes when new reviews exist

activation.current_scope: core paper operator plus Hermes-owned debrief, supervision, planning, daily learning, native memory, and versioned cognitive overlays

books_compatibility_note: These routes keep legacy offline harnesses readable. They are not strategy personalities or live group authority.

books.mandate: Use the current Glitch packet, active Hermes plan, and probabilistic judgment. No fixed archetype or style mandate.
Use the current Glitch packet, active Hermes plan, and probabilistic judgment. Route names are compatibility labels, not cognitive restraints.
